context: Agent must add Vitest configuration to an existing vite.config.ts using workspace-root-relative paths, as required by the nx-vite-integration skill.

checklist.name: Existing config sections preserved
checklist.description: root, cacheDir, plugins, build, server, and preview are identical to the starting file.

checklist.name: test.cache.dir uses workspace-relative path
checklist.description: test.cache.dir is '../../node_modules/.vitest/apps/my-app', not './node_modules/.vitest' or similar project-relative path.

checklist.name: test.globals and reporters present
checklist.description: test.globals is true and test.reporters includes 'default'.
